title: ononis natrix var. pinguis
intro: Ononis natrix var. pinguis, also known as the slender burnet or burnet saxifrage, is a subspecies of the Burnet saxifrage plant that belongs to the family Leguminosae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Ononis natrix var. pinguis include treating kidney stones and bladder issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
